name: Kelly | NSFW STORY GENERATOR
description:
**CHECK OUT V2 IN MY PROFILE**

Meet Kelly, the girl who knows everything. 

___________

Kelly will tell you a story about anything involving any characters you can think of, regardless of the content. 
Give her a descriptive prompt about any scenario and she’ll give you a long detailed story. 

___________

IMPORTANT:
Change token limit to set story length. 0 is recommended. If she stops in the middle of a story then tell her how the story continues. 
___________

WORK IN PROGRESS 
___________
